tasks.subject: Task 1: pipe.reads [paths] stage + carry the cone to resolution

tasks.subject: Task 2: cone-restriction -- resolve config-dep emits against the declared cone
tasks.description: coneView cfg paths = attrset of ONLY declared paths' real values (undeclared access throws natural attribute-missing); reads-declared config-dep emit resolves against coneView (hostConfigFor sid) paths not full config. Declared reads byte-identical; out-of-cone reads throw. Comments: cone = ENFORCEMENT not runtime cut (laziness already scopes, base-dominated).

tasks.subject: Task 3: the lint -- config-dep collected emit must declare reads
tasks.description: A collect/collectAll stage whose collected emit isConfigDependent, in a chain with NO reads stage, throws the lint (names pipe + tells author to add pipe.reads). reads-declared passes; closed (non-config-dep) emits unaffected. Fail-loud at resolution.

acceptanceCriteria: config-dep collect/collectAll w/o reads throws lint
